payload.description: Schedule K: Ratification of Completed Procurement Actions - Runwise Inc Boiler Management Software Tool contract modification

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights

payload.entity_name: MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights

payload.description: Boiler management software tool vendor, provides proprietary software for remote boiler temperature monitoring and control

Pilot program to implement Runwise boiler management software at MTA locations enabling remote boiler temperature monitoring and control. Initial 3-year contract starting October 2023. 11 locations implemented, with 38 additional NYC Transit locations being added.

warnings: project.lead_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Lead agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.
project.partner_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Partner agency is relation context. Suggested relation: has_partner.

payload.description: Start of the three-year pilot program agreement with Runwise Inc for boiler management software
Runwise Program will be reevaluated and decision made to either continue with Runwise or conduct a competitive procurement

tool_args.label: Runwise Expansion to 38 NYC Transit Locations

payload.description: MTA Strategic Initiatives approached MTAHQ Procurement to add 38 new NYC Transit locations to the Runwise contract
Change Order 1 added two bus depots at a cost of $171,000
Change Order 2 added two more bus depots at a cost of $197,000
Original amount of Runwise contract for three-year pilot program agreement
This Request: $908,500 for modification to add 38 NYC Transit locations
New total contract value after adding $908,500 modification, increased from $718,000
Prior Modifications: $368,000 before this request

tool_args.label: Runwise Current Amount Before This Modification

payload.description: Current Amount: $718,000 before this $908,500 modification request
Realized fuel savings of $139,000 over the previous year for seven locations for two to three months of heating season

tool_args.label: Extrapolated Fuel Savings Over Heating Season - 7 Locations

payload.description: Extrapolated fuel savings over the heating season for seven locations
Runwise cost of $169,000 for the seven pilot locations

tool_args.label: Net Savings - 7 Pilot Locations Over Heating Season

payload.raw_value_text: $242,000 or 43 percent over the heating season
payload.description: Net savings of $242,000 or 43 percent over the heating season for seven locations (extrapolated $411,000 minus Runwise cost $169,000)
Proposed cost of $1,018,000 reduced to $908,500, a total savings of $109,500 or 11 percent
Estimated net savings of $903,000 in Year 1 for the 38 added locations, after subtracting the Runwise cost
Estimated net savings of $1,079,000 in Year 2 and beyond for the 38 added locations, after subtracting the Runwise cost
Savings over the heating season for the 38 added locations conservatively estimated at 25 percent

tool_args.label: This Request as Percentage of Current Amount

payload.description: % of This Request to Current Amount: 126%

tool_args.label: Total Modifications as Percentage of Original Amount

payload.description: % of Modifications (including This Request) to Original Amount: 365%
Change Order 1 (November 2023) added two depots at a cost of $171,000
Change Order 2 (December 2023) added two more depots at a cost of $197,000

tool_args.label: Runwise Only Firm Offering Remote Temperature Adjustment

payload.claim_text: Runwise is the only firm that offers the remote temperature adjustment functionality
payload.description: Runwise is the only firm that offers remote boiler temperature adjustment; other vendors offer similar monitoring but not remote adjustment

payload.claim_text: The pilot program resulted in a reduction in fuel consumption across the MTA locations where this software was implemented
Reducing the natural gas and/or heating oil used at the selected MTA buildings will reduce the MTA's carbon footprint, which will help New York City meet its emission targets in 2025/2030 and beyond
The MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights has established zero percent MWBE/SDVOB goals on this contract, as Runwise is the only vendor capable of providing this service

tool_args.label: Negotiated Costs Considered Fair and Reasonable

payload.claim_text: Based on the above, the negotiated costs are considered fair and reasonable
